hooks.command: npm run lint; npm run test:run; if (Select-String -Path src\* -Pattern 'electronAPI' -Recurse -Quiet) { exit 1 }; if (Select-String -Path src\components\* -Pattern '@keyframes nl-' -Recurse -Quiet) { exit 1 }; if (Select-String -Path src\* -Pattern 'window.MacWindow' -Recurse -Quiet) { exit 1 }
Write-Host 'Reminder: re-audit src-tauri/capabilities/default.json against every vendor service, HTTP host, dialog scope, and fs scope before committing.'
